title: [A] Project scaffold, Express server, Railway config
description: Foundation complete: Express server, CORS, static serving, health endpoint, 4 route stubs, Railway config, tests passing.

title: [A] Project scaffold, Express server, Railway config
description: Set up the full project foundation for Frenchie. Create frontend/ and backend/ directory structure, configure Express with CORS and static file serving, add health endpoint, stub all 4 API route files, configure dotenv, and add Railway deployment config. This gates all subsequent phases.

title: Fix history panel not displaying saved entries
description: History panel shows 'No practice history yet' even after LLM feedback is received and saveHistory is called. Investigate and fix the save/render pipeline in frontend/history.js and core.js.

title: Switch TTS from ElevenLabs to browser speechSynthesis
description: ElevenLabs free tier blocks library voices via API. Switch question audio playback to browser speechSynthesis (lang: fr-FR) to avoid API cost. Keep ElevenLabs Scribe for STT transcription. Update audio.js, tests, and upgrade scribe_v1 to scribe_v2 per docs.
close_reason: Implemented: speechSynthesis for TTS, scribe_v2 for STT, tests updated. 122/122 pass.

title: [D3] Test gap analysis + smoke test checklist
description: Gap tests added, 122 tests passing (10 new), SMOKE_TEST.md written.

title: [D2] End-to-end integration wiring
description: Cross-module wiring: core↔audio, core↔history, core↔excel/themes. Integration tests passing.

title: [B1] TTS endpoint — ElevenLabs integration
description: POST /api/tts implemented. Pipes ElevenLabs audio/mpeg stream. Tests passing.

title: [C3] Excel upload mode
description: excel.js: SheetJS parsing, drag-drop, optional model answer column, revert to defaults.

title: [B2] Transcribe endpoint — Whisper integration
description: POST /api/transcribe implemented. Multer memory storage, STT proxy. Tests passing.

title: [B3] Evaluate endpoint — Claude GCSE evaluation
description: POST /api/evaluate implemented. GCSE Edexcel mark-scheme prompt, 7+1 fields, priorAttempts support. Tests passing.

title: [B4] Generate-questions endpoint — Claude theme generation
description: POST /api/generate-questions implemented. 6 Edexcel theme validation, count cap at 10. Tests passing.

title: [B2] Transcribe endpoint — OpenAI Whisper integration
description: Implement POST /api/transcribe in backend/routes/transcribe.js. Accept multipart audio upload via multer memory storage, forward to Whisper API with language=fr, return { transcript }. No disk writes. Depends on Group A.
close_reason: Implemented: POST /api/transcribe uses ElevenLabs Scribe STT (not Whisper). Tests passing.

title: [B1] TTS endpoint — ElevenLabs integration
description: Implement POST /api/tts in backend/routes/tts.js. Accept { text } body, call ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 model, pipe audio/mpeg stream back to client. Handle missing text (400) and upstream errors (502). Depends on Group A.
close_reason: Implemented: POST /api/tts pipes ElevenLabs audio/mpeg stream. Tests passing.

title: UX improvements: scoring /5, TTS rate, translation label
description: Three UX fixes: (1) score each category out of 5 (total /10) for clarity; (2) TTS playback rate 0.5→0.75; (3) clarify translation toggle label is question translation not model answer

title: Add English translation reveal below French question
description: Below #question-text in index.html, add a toggle button and hidden paragraph. When clicked, reveal the idiomatic English translation (currentQuestion.translation) in smaller font. Reset on new question. Wire button in core.js newQuestion().

title: Halve TTS audio playback speed
description: French question audio plays too fast. Set audio.playbackRate = 0.5 on the audio element in frontend/audio.js for both initial play and replay.

title: Swap Claude for Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite scoring LLM
description: Replace @anthropic-ai/sdk with @google/generative-ai in backend/services/claude.js. Use gemini-2.5-flash-lite model. Update GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.example, remove ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Keep same function signatures for evaluateResponse and generateQuestions.

title: Swap Claude for Gemini 2.5 Flash Lite scoring LLM
description: Replace @anthropic-ai/sdk with @google/generative-ai in backend/services/claude.js. Use gemini-2.5-flash-lite model. Update GEMINI_API_KEY in .env.example, remove ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Keep same function signatures for evaluateResponse and generateQuestions.

title: Switch TTS to msedge-tts neural voice
description: Replaced ElevenLabs TTS (blocked on free tier) with msedge-tts package using fr-FR-DeniseNeural. Backend service at backend/services/edge-tts.js. Frontend reverted to fetch-based /api/tts calls with blob URL caching.
close_reason: Already implemented and committed. msedge-tts fr-FR-DeniseNeural, 121 tests pass.

value: generateQuestions (Gemini) now returns [{q, translation}] objects, not string array. Route response shape unchanged: {questions: [...]}. themes.js maps items with fallback: typeof item === 'string' ? item : item.q. translation field populated by Gemini for free — no extra API call for AI-generated questions.

Excel upload zone now shows column format hint: 'Column A: Question | Column B: Answer (omit for AI-judged scoring)'. Added .upload-columns-hint CSS class in styles.css. When no column B, Claude evaluates contextually against Edexcel band descriptors only.
